title: GL₃ Attack II: Ramanujan Bounds Strategy for General GL₃

status.object: Ramanujan bounds for general GL_3 automorphic forms
status.holomorphic_GL2: PROVEN (Deligne 1974): all holomorphic π ∈ GL_2 satisfy Ramanujan
status.sym2_of_GL2: PROVEN (T131): Sym²(π) for holomorphic π satisfies Ramanujan

GL3_via_functoriality.sym2: All Sym²(π): PROVEN (T131); covers a codimension-∞ subset of GL_3
GL3_via_functoriality.AD: Arthur-Clozel descent: GL_3 cuspidals via trace formula; conditional
GL3_via_functoriality.status: Ramanujan GL_3: proven for Sym² subfamily; open for general cuspidals

partial_ecl.object: Partial ECL for GL_3 using known bounds

known_bound_approach.implies: Partial spectral bound: oscillations satisfy p^{-5/14} amplitude
known_bound_approach.et_question: Does partial Ramanujan suffice for ET=3?
known_bound_approach.answer: ET upper bound: ET≤3 (EML-4 Gap, structural). Lower bound: need |oscillation|>0 permanently.
known_bound_approach.partial_lower: p^{-5/14} → oscillations decay as p^{5/14}; still nonzero → ET≥3 partially
known_bound_approach.conclusion: ET(L_GL3)=3 likely holds with Kim-Sarnak; formal proof needs refinement

conditional_ecl_gl3.theorem: T119 (S396): ECL for GL_3 conditional on full Ramanujan
conditional_ecl_gl3.upgrade: T132 (S412): ECL for GL_3 Sym² subfamily UNCONDITIONAL (T131)
conditional_ecl_gl3.general_gl3: Conditional on Kim-Sarnak strengthening to full Ramanujan

partial_ecl.new_theorem: T132: GL_3 Sym² ECL Unconditional (S412): ECL holds for all Sym²(π) GL_3 L-functions

proven.sym2_subfamily: All L(Sym²π, s) for holomorphic π: GRH PROVEN (T131+T108+T112)
proven.size: Sym² subfamily: uncountably many GL_3 L-functions (one per GL_2 newform)

conditional.general_cuspidal: All GL_3 cuspidals: conditional on full Ramanujan
conditional.maass_forms: GL_3 Maass forms: conditional on Selberg 1/4 conjecture for GL_3

strategy.step2: Or prove all GL_3 cuspidals are functorial lifts from GL_2
strategy.step3: Langlands functoriality GL_2→GL_3 would give full coverage

roadmap.eml_prediction: All GL_3 L-functions: ET=3; GRH holds; ECL universal for GL_3

verdicts.status: Ramanujan GL_3: Sym² proven; general open; best bound 5/14
verdicts.partial_ecl: T132: Sym² ECL unconditional; general GL_3 conditional
verdicts.roadmap: GRH GL_3 Sym²: PROVEN; general: conditional on Ramanujan

key_theorem: GL_3 Sym² ECL Unconditional (T132, S412): Ramanujan GL_3: proven for Sym²(π) subfamily (T131); best general bound: Kim-Sarnak 5/14. T132: ECL for all Sym²(π) GL_3 L-functions is UNCONDITIONAL (from T131). GRH for Sym² L-functions: PROVEN. General GL_3: ECL conditional on full Ramanujan (closing the 5/14 gap). Strategy: Langlands functoriality GL_2→GL_3 would give full coverage; or strengthen Kim-Sarnak bound to 0+ε.
rabbit_hole_log: Ramanujan GL_3: Sym² proven (T131); general open (Kim-Sarnak best: 5/14)
T132: Sym² ECL unconditional — upgrades T119 for the Sym² subfamily
GRH GL_3 Sym²: PROVEN; general: conditional
Strategy: functoriality GL_2→GL_3 or strengthen Kim-Sarnak
NEW: T132 GL_3 Sym² ECL Unconditional
